content: The onboarding flow is really confusing. I didn't know where to start after signing up and almost gave up in the first 5 minutes.
problem: confusing onboarding flow after sign-up

content: I can't export my data to CSV. Every other tool I use lets me do this and it's a dealbreaker for my weekly reporting.
problem: Cannot export data to CSV

content: The dashboard loads so slowly when I have more than 50 projects. My team had to stop using it because it times out.
problem: Dashboard loads slowly with many projects

content: Notifications are completely broken. I set up email alerts for new comments but I've never received a single one.
problem: Email alerts for comments are not working

content: Would love a dark mode. I work late nights and the white screen is brutal on my eyes.
problem: Lack of dark mode strains eyes at night

content: The mobile experience is terrible. Half the buttons don't work on my phone and I can't scroll through the list properly.
problem: mobile experience is broken and unusable

content: I wish I could invite teammates. Right now everything is stuck in my account and I can't collaborate with my PM or designer.
problem: Cannot invite teammates to collaborate

content: Search doesn't work at all. I typed in the exact name of a project and got zero results. Had to scroll through everything manually.
problem: Search returns no results for exact matches

content: The pricing page is misleading. I thought I was on the free plan but got charged $49 at the end of the month with no warning.
problem: Unexpected charge after free plan

content: Can you add keyboard shortcuts? Power users like me live in the keyboard and the mouse-only workflow slows me down a lot.
problem: Lack of keyboard shortcuts slows down power users

content: The import from Notion doesn't work. It just says "processing" forever and nothing shows up. I've tried 4 times.
problem: Notion import stuck on 'processing'

content: I love the core idea but the AI suggestions are way too generic. It just tells me obvious things I already know. Needs to be smarter.
problem: AI suggestions are too generic

content: There's no undo button. I accidentally deleted a whole project and lost hours of work. This is a critical missing feature.
problem: No undo button, lost project data

content: The editor keeps losing my work when I switch tabs. I've lost the same paragraph three times today. Super frustrating.
problem: Editor loses work when switching tabs

content: Would be amazing if you integrated with Slack so I could get updates without having to log into yet another tool.
problem: No Slack integration for updates

content: The signup process asks for my credit card before I can try anything. I'd like to at least see the product before committing.
problem: Credit card required before product trial

content: Filtering is really limited. I need to filter by date range AND tag at the same time but it only lets me pick one.
problem: Cannot filter by date range and tag simultaneously

content: The API documentation is outdated. Half the endpoints listed don't exist or return different responses than what's documented.
problem: API documentation is outdated and inaccurate

content: I keep getting logged out randomly in the middle of sessions. Happens maybe twice a day and I lose whatever I was working on.
problem: Random logouts causing loss of work

content: The bulk actions feature only works on 10 items at a time. I have 200 entries I need to update and doing it in batches of 10 is painful.
problem: Bulk actions limited to 10 items

content: No way to duplicate a project. I have to recreate everything from scratch each time which wastes so much time.
problem: Cannot duplicate projects

content: The loading spinner just spins forever when my internet is slow. No error message, no retry button, just infinite loading.
problem: Loading spinner spins forever with slow internet

content: I want to see a changelog or activity log for my projects. Right now I have no idea what my team changed or when.
problem: Cannot track team changes in projects

content: The color contrast on the buttons is terrible. I have mild color blindness and I genuinely cannot tell which buttons are clickable.
problem: Poor color contrast on buttons

content: Two-factor authentication setup failed three times. I had to ask support to manually verify my account.
problem: Two-factor authentication setup failed repeatedly

content: Can't attach files to items. I need to link screenshots and specs directly in the tool, not in a separate Notion doc.
problem: Cannot attach files to items

content: The CSV import silently drops rows that have commas in the text. Lost half my data and had no idea until I counted manually.
problem: CSV import drops rows with commas

content: No way to archive completed projects. My dashboard is cluttered with finished work and I can't hide it.
problem: Cannot archive completed projects

content: Tags are not searchable. I tag everything but then can't filter or search by those tags anywhere.
problem: Tags are not searchable or filterable

content: The free trial just ended with no warning email. I logged in one day and everything was paywalled with no notice.
problem: Free trial ended without warning email

content: Comments on items don't send notifications to anyone. My team leaves feedback and nobody ever sees it.
problem: Comments on items don't send notifications

content: I'd love a Jira integration. Right now I have to manually copy issues across and it takes forever.
problem: Manual copying of issues to Jira

content: The date picker doesn't support keyboard input. I have to click through the calendar one month at a time to set old dates.
problem: Date picker lacks keyboard input for old dates

content: Session timeout is way too aggressive. I get logged out after 10 minutes of inactivity even mid-workflow.
problem: Session timeout is too aggressive

content: Can't reorder items manually. Everything is sorted by date and there's no drag-and-drop to prioritize things my own way.
problem: Cannot manually reorder or prioritize items

content: The email verification link expires in 10 minutes. That's too short when you're in back-to-back meetings and miss it.
problem: Email verification link expires too quickly

content: I can't see who else is online or working on the same project. I keep overwriting my colleague's changes by accident.
problem: Cannot see who else is online

content: Charts and graphs are completely missing. I need to visualize trends over time but everything is just lists.
problem: Charts and graphs are missing

content: The onboarding checklist never clears even when I've done all the steps. It just stays there permanently.
problem: Onboarding checklist doesn't clear

content: Please add a command palette like Linear or Notion has. Navigating purely through the sidebar is slow for power users.
problem: Slow navigation for power users
